description: Represents a DNS report sent by an app agent within an app report.

CNAMEs.description: The canonical name (CNAME) records associated with the domain, if any.
CNAMEs.title: CNAMEs

IPAddresses.description: The list of IP addresses associated with the domain.
IPAddresses.title: IPAddresses

actionOrigin.description: The origin where the action was taken.
actionOrigin.title: actionOrigin

appComponent.description: The app component that this target represents.
appComponent.title: appComponent

hits.description: The number of times this domain was queried.
hits.title: hits

policyID.description: The reference to the policy ID that triggered this action.
policyID.title: policyID

provider.description: The provider that this target represents.
provider.title: provider

workloadGroupHash.description: The hash of the workload group this application belongs to.
workloadGroupHash.title: workloadGroupHash

workloadGroupLabel.description: The label format of the workload group this application belongs to.
workloadGroupLabel.title: workloadGroupLabel

workloadGroupSetHash.description: The hash of the workload group set this application belongs to.
workloadGroupSetHash.title: workloadGroupSetHash

workloadGroupSetLabel.description: The label format of the workload group set this application belongs to.
workloadGroupSetLabel.title: workloadGroupSetLabel

title: DNSReport
